summary: Focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform (Summit), embedded firmware for HID devices, and AI/ML projects including on-device LLM assistants and trading strategy research. Also maintained Windows utilities and contributed to automation tooling.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a KMDF input filter driver for Windows with event delivery and integration testing.

items.title: Android TTS engine
items.description: Started a new Android text-to-speech engine project using Silero and phonetizer.

items.title: Crypto trading platform development
items.description: Iterated on the SaaS crypto trading platform, focusing on proxy infrastructure, billing model, and strategy templates.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Drafted a new firmware variant for the ESP32-S3 mouse/keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished the file-tagging Explorer extension, fixing release workflow and metadata handling.

items.title: Computer vision aim assist
items.description: Worked on a CV-based aim assist tool with YOLO detection, overlay rendering, and USB-HID fallback.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model
items.description: Experimented with Mixture of Experts architectures and benchmarking for a crypto price prediction model.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant
items.description: Developed an Android LLM assistant with sub-agent delegation, tool routing, and model management.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Built v12 and v13 firmware versions with dual-core processing and USB connectivity.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Built an Android launcher for e-ink devices centered around note-taking, with gesture navigation and drawing.

items.title: File-tagging utility CI/CD and Store publishing
items.description: Set up CI/CD pipelines, Microsoft Store publishing, and CLI improvements for the Windows file-tagging tool.

items.title: Code intelligence graph engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Created a minimalistic, browser-based YOLO labeling tool with batch editing features.

items.title: Neovim development environment
items.description: Set up a Neovim configuration with LSP, treesitter, and remote clipboard support.

items.title: Poker hand history extraction
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline to extract poker hand histories from video, achieving high detection accuracy.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Fixed communication stability and graceful restart for the HID firmware.

items.title: n8n node for Claude Code
items.description: Updated an n8n node for Claude Code agent integration, migrating to the latest SDK.

items.title: Android task management app
items.description: Improved an Android tasker app with touch visualization and direct launch features.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware v11
items.description: Developed v11 firmware with new device support, performance profiles, and BLE safety features.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Worked on an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool, adding squash merge and worktree completion features.

items.title: Aim assist tool enhancements
items.description: Added aim assist modes, HID mouse movement, and rate limiting to the CV-based utility.

items.title: n8n Claude Code node
items.description: Released version 0.4.0 of the n8n node, migrating to Claude Agent SDK.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram multi-bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot interface for managing multiple Freqtrade instances, with web dashboard and profit tracking.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous trading strategies for Freqtrade, focusing on hyperopt and performance.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Maintained a Telegram bot for content forwarding, summarization, and image deduplication.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Updated a .NET-based ChatGPT Telegram bot with long message support and improvements.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Optimized trading strategies for Freqtrade, performing hyperopt and parameter tuning.

items.title: Crypto signal Telegram bot
items.description: Developed a Telegram bot that generates crypto trading signals using AI and technical analysis.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Worked on a .NET ChatGPT Telegram bot, adding features and version bumps.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Maintained the file-tagging Explorer extension, adding CLI and UI polish.
